column1: Hey Linda, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Is that a good time to go to Cancun?
Yea for sure! thats actually the busiest week
how many ppl in your group so far? I'll send the options
yea thats solid! all from the same school?
word all good ill still hook it up with a good group rate
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
hey sorry i knocked out, but gonna send this over rn, whats the best email for you?
hey gonna send this to lindalkim@yahoo.com that cool?
just sent that over lmk if you got it
hey that email ever come through?
hey checkin in, we narrow in on which option we wanna roll with?
What hotels are recommended in the area
I just booked our flight and hotel. We will be in Cancun from March 19-March 22. We are looking for a good time. Spring break party recommendations?
are you just looking for a party pass?
cool i got you, we do offer a party package, includes 3 events, can choose between club like la vaquita, madala, coco bongo, or a booze cruise
for the 3 night club event its $210, $279 for 4 nights, and $79 for the booze cruise
each one is for a different day
you can use them for whatever days you'd like
hey checkin in, did we want to secure that pass?
We do but I think more people may be joining us so I'll keep you posted
for the 3 night club event its $210, $279 for 4 nights, and $79 for the booze cruise Is this for a group price or is it per person?
Do you have any pics you can share for the booze cruise?
hey yea! here's a video from last years booze cruise, super lit https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Is4RzNfxeZg
hey did we wanna grab that party pass?
Yes but I'm trying to figure out who's going
I'll let you know by tonight
Do you have like a birthday special?
What deals do you have for 5 people?
for the party pass we dont have any further deals running. I gave you the pricing we give our actual travelers at the add on price, rather than our normal retail price
I think I'll just go with the booze cruise. Do you have just 1 night ticket to night clubs?
yea we can do 1 booze cruise ticket and 1 nightclub ticket
actually it looks like the lowest party pass amount we have is the 3 night. thats $210. if you want to buy a single night you'll have to do that in person on site when you arrive
we can do the single booze cruise tho, its $79 per person
Liked “actually it looks like the lowest party pass amount we have is the 3 night. thats $210. if you want to buy a single night you'll have to do that in person on site when you arrive”
Okay let's do 5 tickets to booze cruise
And I guess we will figure out the night clubs when we get there
okay cool yea I got you
youre staying at grand oasis march 19-22 right
What does the grand oasis have going on during that time?
I dont have access to the resort schedule at the moment, but the resort is like always lit
theres a ton of ppl that will be there
Loved “I dont have access to the resort schedule at the moment, but the resort is like always lit”
gonna send you the booze cruise link now
Will email this over to you as well. hit the join this trip button and you'll see the 5 slots!
hey morning did you all still want this booze cruise reservation?
word when did y'all plan on getting it secured
hey did you still need this reservation?
Yes but with everything going on right now in Mexico. What do you think?
Totally fair. Right now there is no travel ban or restriction for Cancun, and we have groups down there at the moment operating as normal
cool just lmk what you need
Is the booze cruise for one day only
yea its a day event, like 4-5 hours
hey did you still plan on securing that?
Yes, I'm going to secure it tonight. I didn't realize it needs passport info so I need to gather it
ahh gotcha youre actually able to skip that part. just add in the passport country
Ok let me try when I'm not driving
hey were you able to hop on that res?
I did a couple. I just need to pay
hey when did y'all plan on securing the party passes
I reserved 4 spots. I was trying to make payment but it is not letting me
Ill see if I can get it reactivated
looks like its still active, whats happening when yo try to pay it?
It doesn't allow me to click on the reserve button but the names are in there
You made an account already, so your next step is to log in
there should be a person icon at the top if youre on mobile
It doesn't give me a payment area for it, can you help?
Hey you have to log in at the top with the user details you made
Okay all 5 has been reserved and paid, can you confirm it
How do I get the tickets or are you meeting me at the resort?
Can I add one more person
hey! yea I got you, thats open now. and yes we have our onsite staff at the resort, you'll head to our hospitality desk after checking in to get the wristbands you need for the cruise
Hey, where do I go to meet up to go to the booze cruise?
you're at the grand oasis right? did you head to our hospitality desk in the main building to meet our team and get your wristbands / tickets
if not you can head down there now
What time is the booze cruise
I'm not sure your exact meeting time that was scheduled. you'll get that from our hospitality desk in the main building. have you gotten to go down there to redeem everything you need?
once you get there, thats when everything is scheduled and they give you all of the meeting info, wristbands / tickets needed, etc
Gonna connect you with Manuel from the booze cruise team, he will meet you on the resort and get you situated
We didn't get to make it to booze cruise because of miscommunication. Is there any chance of a refund
hey good morning. what was the miscommunication
I couldn't get a hold of anyone to get on the bus until the last day of my trip so we didn't make it on
